data.title: Israel, Hezbollah Trade Strikes In Latest Sign Of Crumbling Ceasefire
data.description: Israel fired rockets at the occupied Shebaa Farms on Monday night, landing in an open area.

data.title: Honeywell Stock Slides After Hours On Updated 2024 Outlook
data.description: Honeywell International Inc (NASDAQ:HON) shares are trading lower in Monday's after-hours session after the company announced a strategic agreement with Bombardier and cut its near-term 2024 outlook.

data.title: Why This Streaming Giant Could Be December's Best Stock Pick, Backed By 20 Years Of Data
data.description: Netflix has rallied an average of 14.1% from early December through the end of January, with a median return of 11%.

data.title: Stock Of The Day: Stellantis Faces Uncertainty, But Could Support Trigger A Rally?
data.description: Stellantis N.V. (STLA) are trading lower after the CEO resigned. They are getting close to a support level. Technical traders sense profits.

data.title: Trump's FBI Pick Kash Patel Builds Wealth Through Trump Media, PAC Payments, Kid's Books
